title: English Version of Cruel Angel Thesis
display_title: English Version of Cruel Angel Thesis
wikitext:
[]: English Version of Cruel Angel Thesis?             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Fri Nov 17, 2006 6:04 pm Is there an english version of Cruel Angel Thesis somewhere out there? I think I have just about all the versions there ever was, but if I could find an english version of the coolest anime song around, that would make my day!

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Nov 17, 2006 6:52 pm There's the subtitled version, but... Cruel Angel's Thesis... in English... ... Do the syllables even match up to the tune in English?

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Fri Nov 17, 2006 7:12 pm Wouldn't sound good at all..

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Nov 17, 2006 8:49 pm ewwww i only know one or two songs where the english version of a Japanese song sounded good. This is song just doesnt fit w/ english words

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 17, 2006 9:24 pm Nope.

[]:             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Fri Nov 17, 2006 10:42 pm The Bastard King wrote: There's the subtitled version, but... Cruel Angel's Thesis... in English... ... Do the syllables even match up to the tune in English?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 18, 2006 12:09 am I can't even imagine an English adaptation being good. Give me a German one, though.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Nov 18, 2006 2:37 am thats about what i expected to hear... but you'd probly haveta tweak a few words to make it sound good... always put music into different languages with a thesarus...as someone with experience in the area, i know that songs dont sound good if you literally translate them

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Nov 18, 2006 5:17 am I'd rather it didn't. You know, the melody is good doesn't mean stuffing English words in will sound good too.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 19, 2006 3:33 am some songs just sound better in one language... "Time to say goodbye" is ONLY good in Italian... "Der Herr Segne Euch" ONLY good in German... "Silent Night" Quite lovely in English or German "Washu's Science Song" Silly in Japanese and English "Cruel Angel's Thesis"?...you never know till you try... The only song from anime that have been sung in English...where i like the English better is "Money No More" from Pretty Sammy...The theme for Detective Conan was good in English too

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Nov 19, 2006 4:20 am I suppose that the theme songs for both Kingdom Hearts games (Passion, Simple and Clean) sounded pretty good in English... better then I thought they would have, at the very least.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 19, 2006 4:46 am maybe we should give it a try... we could get the english lyrics and use our happy thesaruses and brains to make it make sense... seriously... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Sun Nov 19, 2006 12:00 pm Reichu wrote: I can't even imagine an English adaptation being good. Give me a German one, though.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 19, 2006 11:22 pm AWWW...if i just had a digital recorder i WOULD TOTALLY SING THAT!!! ...ill get one fer christmas...i promise to do my best 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Iblis 19th Angel » Thu Nov 23, 2006 2:13 am I actually tried something like that once, but it kinda sucked. Not a translation of the song, but a different English theme song to the same tune. Here's the link if you wanna take a look. [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=24827#24827[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Thu Nov 23, 2006 2:23 am Iblis, Blade of the Fallen Seraph, come to me my beautiful. The Bastard King wrote: I suppose that the theme songs for both Kingdom Hearts games (Passion, Simple and Clean) sounded pretty good in English... better then I thought they would have, at the very least.

[]:             Quote Post by Angel of Will » Sat Jun 16, 2012 6:54 pm Perhaps this should be moved to the Fan Stuff/Whatever section Reichu wrote: I can't even imagine an English adaptation being good.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat Jun 16, 2012 8:21 pm I don't care what you guys say, but everything sounds good in latin. EVERYTHING.

[]:             Quote Post by JB2448 » Mon Jun 18, 2012 1:52 pm Well, as far as fan dubs, there's this one .

[]:             Quote Post by Angel of Will » Mon Jun 18, 2012 4:40 pm Yeah, I didn't like the flow+wording of that one, which is why I wrote mine. I mean, she does good fandubs, but I thought I could write a better CAT.
